actions.name: apt-cacher-ng Image
actions.description: Builds and pushes a Docker image for apt-cacher-ng based on Debian trixie. Sets up QEMU and Docker Buildx, logs into GitHub Container Registry, creates a Dockerfile, and builds the image for multiple platforms. The image is configured for caching and logging, with specific runtime parameters.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 4:00, on Mon

actions.name: Docker Images For Automation
actions.description: Builds and pushes Docker images for various Armbian distributions based on a generated build matrix. It sets up the necessary environment, creates Dockerfiles, and utilizes Docker Buildx to build images for specified architectures. A summary of the built images is generated and pushed to the GitHub Container Registry.
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 3:00

actions.name: git_cdn Image
actions.description: Builds and pushes a multi-architecture Docker image for git_cdn from upstream source, including a Python wheel and a custom Dockerfile. Utilizes QEMU and Docker Buildx for cross-platform builds, and logs into the GitHub Container Registry for image storage. The process includes setting up the environment, cloning the source, building the wheel, and creating a Docker image with specific configurations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 6:00, on Mon

actions.name: Watchdog
actions.description: Monitors and manages the execution of specified Docker-related workflows by checking their status and rerunning failed jobs up to three times. It operates on a schedule or can be manually triggered, ensuring that critical workflows are maintained effectively. The process involves querying GitHub Actions for workflow runs and taking action based on their outcomes.

actions.name: Docker Images for Framework
actions.description: Updates Docker images for building CI by generating Dockerfiles and building multi-architecture images. Builds and pushes images for various OS and release combinations, then creates multi-arch manifests to consolidate them. Ensures the latest base images are used and retries builds if they fail.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 3:00
